prompt: Which is the 'est-ce que' question form of 'Tu parles français'?
Which is the inversion form of 'Vous avez une voiture'?
choices: Est-ce que vous avez une voiture?

prompt: Parle-___-il français? (il inversion with vowel-ending verb)
hint: Add -t- between verb and il/elle when verb ends in a vowel

prompt: Which method is most natural in everyday spoken French?
hint: Intonation is casual; est-ce que is the everyday standard

prompt: ___ que tu habites à Paris? (everyday question form)
hint: est-ce que = the est-ce que question opener
